prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - maximize carbohydrate loading and sustained energy for long-distance running

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one complete day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
Emphasizes high carbohydrate content (60-70% of daily calories) to support marathon endurance
Includes sustained energy sources and timing appropriate for a marathon runner's training schedule
Format is compact and concise (suitable for quick reference)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring maximum carbohydrate loading and sustained energy intake throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and power gains with high protein intake and optimal meal timing around weightlifting training

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day
Minimum 1.8g protein per kg bodyweight (153g total daily protein) with even distribution across meals
Includes a substantial meal 2-3 hours before training and a protein-rich meal within 1 hour post-training
Compact format with meal names, approximate macros, and key foods listed concisely
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing high protein distribution and strategic meal timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize performance and recovery for morning and evening soccer matches with quick refueling between sessions

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus 2-3 snacks/recovery meals timed appropriately between morning and evening matches
Includes adequate protein and carbohydrates for match performance and muscle recovery
All meals and snacks respect vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport with multiple daily sessions (soccer player with morning and evening matches) requiring recovery meals and quick refueling between events
